backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for projects, blog posts, skills, leads, services, testimonials, SEO settings, social links, and experiences, with access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module for a V16-to-V12 rollback that defines the Actor state shape and a no-op `run` function returning the old state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the Vite/TypeScript main module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that configures TanStack Router with public and admin nested route layouts, lazy-loads all page components, and wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status via the backend, rendering login or access-denied screens for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Admin panel sidebar component that renders navigation links to all admin management sections with active-state highlighting based on the current route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with navigation links, active social media icons fetched from the backend, a contact call-to-action, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the Navigation, Footer, and ProfileSetup components inside a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity, toggling authentication state and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, active-route highlighting, social links, theme toggle, and login button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Shows a modal dialog prompting newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Imperatively updates the document title and meta description tag based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts: Thin wrapper around useActor that exposes a typed call helper which guards against invoking backend functions when the actor is unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including CRUD for blog posts, projects, services, skills, testimonials, leads, SEO settings, social links, experiences, and user profile/admin management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts) plus utility component classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying a developer profile card, stats, bio, values list, and links to contact/projects sections for Boby Dhorajiya.
Admin page for managing blog posts with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form that auto-generates slugs from titles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and up/down reordering controls.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards (projects, blogs, leads, etc.) and navigation cards linking to each admin management section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExperienceManag: Admin page for managing work experience entries with CRUD operations, search, pagination, and a form supporting dynamic responsibility list items.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page rendering an accordion-based guide covering all admin panel sections such as projects, blog, SEO, and social links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact leads, with debounced search filtering and client-side pagination across a card-based list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for full CRUD management of portfolio projects, supporting drag-and-drop reordering, image uploads, category assignment, and active/inactive toggling.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting per-page SEO settings (meta title and description), with debounced search and paginated card display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing services with add, edit, and delete operations via a dialog form, debounced search, and paginated card list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with category, name, and experience fields, supporting create/edit/delete via dialogs and paginated search results.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social media links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) with CRUD operations, search/pagination, toggle active state, and a dialog form for adding/editing links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing testimonial entries (author and message fields).
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts as cards with title, description, and date, with loading skeletons and navigation to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that looks up a post by slug from the fetched posts list and renders its HTML content with SEO metadata, loading skeletons, and a not-found fallback.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a lead submission form (name, email, message) and info cards for email, location, and response time, using toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Displays a timeline of professional work experiences fetched via `useGetExperiences`, showing job title, company, period, description, and responsibilities with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, tech stack showcase, FAQ accordion, and social links, with scroll-triggered animations and data fetched via `useGetSocialLinks`.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a home link and a back-navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Portfolio projects page that fetches projects and categories, supports category filtering, and renders project cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that fetches and displays service cards with a live search/filter input and loading skeleton states.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page that groups fetched skills by category and renders progress bars based on years of experience, with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page that fetches and displays client/colleague feedback in a grid of cards with star ratings and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono), extended color palette using OKLCH values (including cyan and navy scales), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file at schema version 13 that records the goal of restoring backend/main.mo to its Version 12 state and building a migration.mo to transition canister state from Version 16 back to Version 12 without data loss.
